title: URAファイナルズ決勝の後に・敗北

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there you are! Good job today! I have
something I want to say to you!

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Your racer ran great out there! Seriously, I had
chills.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to compete against you guys again!
See you at the next Unity Cup!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
I also wanted to say that, um... your racer didn't
do so bad out there.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Not that I'm... complimenting you or anything.
